title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. impunctatum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. impunctatum, also known as the hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. impunctatum include its potential to reduce pain, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
